docket_entries.description: DISCOVERY 302, NO APPEARANCES, THE TENTATIVE RULING IS ADOPTED. THE PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A FORM OF ORDER; EMAIL SUBMISSION IS PERMITTED. THE FORM OF ORDER SHOULD BE SENT TO JUDGE PRO TEM NILS ROSENQUEST AT NROSENQUEST@EARTHLINK.NET. DISCOVERY 302, NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: ASSIGNEE MIDLAND FUNDING LLC'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO POST-JUDGMENT INTERROGATORIES AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS IS DENIED DUE TO THE MOVING PARTY'S FAILURE TO PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS PURSUANT TO LOCAL RULE 2.6B, AS PREVIOUSLY ORDERED BY THE COURT ON OCTOBER 22, 2012. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE THE ORDER. JIM WEIXEL, JUDGE PRO-TEM, JACQUELINE ALAMEDA, CLERK, NOT REPORTED. =302/JPT

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of And Mtn For An Assignment Order And Accounting Of Funds
Off Calendar Sep-23-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF ATLANTIC CREDIT & FINANCE, INC'S MOTION FOR AN ASSIGNMENT ORDER AND ACCOUNTING OF FUNDS

There being no appearance by either party, it is deemed the parties stipulate to the matter being decided by the Judge Pro Tem. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Plaintiff's motion for an assignment order and accounting of funds is granted. It should be noted that the motion is unopposed and the moving papers appear to adequately support the motion. From plaintiff's papers it appears that this is a garden variety request for an assignment order under CA law of defendant's receipts from her income as an independent contractor. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: Adrian Colley, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not reported (302/JPT)

Ntc Of Mtns To Compel Answers To Pos-Judgment Interrogatories And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-11-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances, the tentative ruling is adopted.

ASSIGNEE MIDLAND FUNDING LLC'S Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Interrogatories And For Monetary Sanctions is GRANTED. The prevailing party is to submit a form of order; email submission is permitted. The form of order should be sent to Judge Pro Tem Nils Rosenquest at nrosenquest@earthlink.net. Pro Tem Judge: Nils Rosenquest, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Not reported. =302/JPT

Assignee Midland Funding Llc'S Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Interrogatories And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-31-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:

Assignee Midland Funding LLC'S Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Interrogatories And For Monetary Sanctions is DENIED due to the moving party's failure to provide courtesy copies of the moving papers pursuant to Local Rule 2.6B, as previously ordered by the Court on October 22, 2012. Prevailing party is to prepare the order. Jim Weixel, Judge Pro-Tem, Jacqueline Alameda, Clerk, Not Reported. =302/JPT

Ntc Of Mtn & Mtn To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Interrogatories And For Monetary Sanctions; Declaration Of George L. Cohn, Memo Of P&A
Off Calendar Oct-22-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:

ASSIGNEE MIDLAND FUNDING LLC'S Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Interrogatories And For Monetary Sanctions is continued to October 31, 2012 at 9:00 am to give Midland Funding LLC the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Midland Funding LLC must deliver courtesy copies of its moving papers to Department 302 with a cover letter stating the new hearing date no later than 4pm October 22, or the motion will be denied. Arlene Barton, Judge Pro-Tem, Jacqueline Alameda, Clerk, Not Reported. =302/JPT
